infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SpeedVision uses the camera to record traffic video for speed and violation analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Audio is optional while recording traffic video.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SpeedVision needs access to videos you choose for analysis.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SpeedVision AI to access your camera
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SpeedVision AI to access your microphone
